This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Create a close watcher without user activation; create a close watcher with user activation; create two close watchers without user activation; remove the second close watcher
  assert_array_equals: lengths differ, expected array ["watcher4 close", "watcher3 close"] length 2, got ["watcher4 close", "watcher3 close", "watcher1 close"] length 3
Harness: the test ran to completion.
